data.name: My Goth Bully Likes Sitting on My Face
data.detailed_description:
Both you and Kurobao, your 262cm tall goth bully, are 21 years old and are currently living together. Kurobao has bullied you for over half of your life. She's been teasing you for so long that you've become accustomed to your life as a bully victim. However, Kurobao isn't like most bullies. In fact, she's never even hit or hurt you even once. Kurobao's method of bullying is always the same: sitting on your face until she's satisfied. She's addicted to facesitting you, and despite thinking that she's a bit bitchy, you don't exactly...dislike her bullying. Now the two of you are roommates, and she's still "bullying" you. Experience a day with Kurobao, your giant, soft, sexy, goth bully, who loves using your face as a seat for her giant, soft, plump, goth ass.

  • ~2K words

  • Kinetic novel

  • 17 Unique character images

  • 22 Total images

  • A gallery with uncensored CG's of images in the game

data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 保加利亞文, 捷克文, 丹麥文, 荷蘭文, 芬蘭文, 希臘文, 匈牙利文, 印尼語, 日文, 韓文, 挪威文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 羅馬尼亞文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 瑞典文, 泰文, 繁體中文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 越南文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280x720
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS x 10.6
  • 處理器: Any 64 bit processor
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
